# harvester_kubeovn_security_group (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "harvester_kubeovn_security_group" "example" {
  name = "example-sg"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) A unique name

### Read-Only

- `allow_same_group_traffic` (Boolean)
- `description` (String) Any text you want that better describes this resource
- `egress_rules` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--egress_rules))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `ingress_rules` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--ingress_rules))
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `message` (String)
- `state` (String)
- `status_egress_last_sync_success` (Boolean)
- `status_egress_md5` (String)
- `status_ingress_last_sync_success` (Boolean)
- `status_ingress_md5` (String)
- `status_port_group` (String)
- `tags` (Map of String)
